4. Download a report resource

4. Download a report resource
Download a resource belonging to a report. This can be the full report, dropped binaries, etc.
Base Command
sndbox-download-report
Input
name: sndbox-download-report

outputs.description: File name InfoFile.EntryID The EntryID of the report
outputs.name: InfoFile.Name

outputs.description: File size InfoFile.Type File type, e.g., "PE"
outputs.name: InfoFile.Size

outputs.description: Basic information of the file InfoFile.Extension File extension
outputs.name: InfoFile.Info
